prompt: First-person perspective (POV) holding a sleek modern smartphone, taking a photo of a rustic wooden dining table laden with a mountain of golden pancakes, mashed potatoes, and meat cutlets. A soft teal and lime green holographic scanner interface glows from the phone screen, casting a subtle neon light onto the food. The background is a cozy, warm-lit kitchen with premium wooden textures. Photorealistic, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high-end food photography style, subtle cyberpunk accents, 8k resolution, vertical composition.
negative_prompt: readable text, letters, numbers, watermark, QR code, logo, brand name, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy UI, low resolution, cartoon, illustration.
notes: Used a POV (first-person) angle to directly illustrate the 'just take a photo' benefit mentioned in the text.
Combined traditional comfort food (pancakes, cutlets) with high-tech teal/green neon overlays to bridge the 'grandma's house' and 'cyberpunk' themes.
Used warm wood tones for the table to keep the 'premium lifestyle' look from the references.
Ensured the UI is purely visual/holographic with no actual characters to avoid AI text generation issues.
